# zendesk_target (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk target by ID or title.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the target. Provide either id or title.
- `title` (String) The title of the target. Provide either id or title.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean)
- `created_at` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `subject` (String)
- `type` (String)
